title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Kansai Nerolac International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Kansai Nerolac International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Kansai Nerolac International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Nashik. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Kansai Nerolac International Enterprises:
Kansai Nerolac International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kansai Nerolac International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
